prompt: My code-corpus index in Pinecone currently uses llama-text-embed-v2 as an integrated model. I want to migrate it to use voyage-code-3 instead. What's the safest plan? I have ~50k records across 8 repo namespaces.

assertions.text: Specifies dim=1024, metric=cosine for the new standard index
References memory-config.json or graphify update path (ecosystem-aware)
Calls out input_type=query at verification/search time
